body.title: Introduce the Domain object (BaseDomain + CodingDomain): owns selection + prompts
body.description:
**Problem:** domain-specificity is scattered — model selection is in rules_engine, prompts in domain_prompts.py, and there's no object that IS 'the coding domain'. **Shape:** add a BaseDomain (in unseen_university/devices/inference/domains/) with a CodingDomain subclass owning (1) select(available_sources, registry) -> ordered capable candidates for this domain, cost-optimizing + availability-aware (delegating to the existing selector logic initially, but OWNED by the domain), and (2) prompts (system + loop prompts, absorbing domain_prompts.py's 'coding' entry). Behavior-preserving: the domain wraps existing selection + prompt behavior, relocated. The Proxy resolves a domain name -> Domain object. **Affected files:** NEW unseen_university/devices/inference/domains/{__init__,base,coding}.py; unseen_university/devices/inference/domain_prompts.py (coding prompt moves into CodingDomain, shim left or removed). **Design rules:** device.py/OOP-first; one import root; NO SQLITE. **Scope boundary:** IN — the Domain abstraction + CodingDomain owning selection+prompts, behavior-preserving. OUT — moving the loop/escalation (next ticket); thinning DS (next); removing task_class globally (follow-on decision). **Test plan (stub-first):** (1) CodingDomain.select() over a stub source set returns the same ordered candidates rules_engine.route(domain='coding') does today; (2) CodingDomain.prompts.system == the current domain_prompt('coding') text; (3) an unknown domain name resolves to a generalist/base behavior, not a crash. **Completion criteria:** CodingDomain exists and reproduces today's coding selection + prompt from one object; tests green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Domain object introduced: BaseDomain + CodingDomain own selection (delegating to RulesEngine selector via domain-name filter) + prompts (from domain-prompt store). Proxy resolves request.domain -> Domain object at its 3 route sites. Behavior-preserving via name-passthrough (unknown/generalist names carried through, never collapsed); 419 passed incl. 6 new domain-object tests, 3 pre-existing mini-rack fails unchanged. Commit 38768e41.
body.unproven_reason: new-module stub-first lever: domains/ landed as a single impl commit, so proof_emitter's red run removes the ADDED files -> collateral ImportError (rejected), not authentic assertion-red. The load-bearing new behavior (domain filter flows through select) is covered by a non-vacuous red-able test, but proving via proof_emitter needs the stub-commit-then-impl-commit split this ticket didn't use.
